name: Shanghai Liangxin Electrical Co., Ltd.
summary: Shanghai Liangxin Electrical Co., Ltd. researches, develops, and produces low-voltage electrical apparatus in China. The company offers frame breakers, molded case circuit breakers, dual power supply products, disconnectors, miniature circuit breakers, and electromagnetic circuit breakers. It also provides industrial products comprising contactors, contactor relays, switch capacitor contactors, starters, switches, thermal relays, and motor protection circuit breakers. It serves the energy, telecommunications, construction, electricity, industrial, and other industries. The company was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Shanghai, China.
